query: SELECT id, domain, campaignRunStatus as status, campaignPhase as phase, campaignTotalPhases as total, campaignProgress as progress, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, campaignStartedAt, NOW()) as minutes_running FROM seo_projects WHERE campaignRunStatus = 'running';
